title: Testimony before the U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission
summary: The economic and national security of the United States is now inextricably connected to China’s energy consumption with respect to the environment, oil and gas security, and the economy.
body: Hearing on China's Energy Consumption and Opportunities for U.S.-China Cooperation to Address the Effects of China's Energy Use The latest from Belfer See more This page is for archival purposes as its content is no longer available.
